description_long: This cabin consists of three main rectangular structures connected by a central open platform, all elevated on stilts. The roofs are steeply pitched and asymmetrical, with overlapping sections that create a dynamic, modern silhouette. The exterior features a combination of wood and metal paneling, with visible support columns and railings around the central platform. There are multiple entry points via ramps and stairs, and a bare tree is integrated into the design near one corner. Windows are minimal and asymmetrically placed, contributing to a contemporary, utilitarian aesthetic. The overall structure appears modular and open, suitable for communal or multi-family residential use.
description: A modern, stilted cabin complex with three connected sections, steep asymmetrical roofs, and a central open platform. The design features wood and metal materials, minimal windows, and multiple entryways.
description_view_0: Front view showing three main cabin sections, central open platform, railings, and two entry ramps.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the overlapping, asymmetrical roofs and the integration of a bare tree near the structure.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full width of the central platform, the three distinct cabin sections, and the arrangement of stairs and ramps.
description_view_3: Opposite angled side view emphasizing the roof geometry and the relationship between the three main sections.
attribute_roof_type: asymmetrical shed roofs with overlapping sections and extended overhangs, constructed from metal panels
attribute_window_arrangement: minimal, asymmetrical windows of varying sizes, irregularly distributed across the visible facades, with no clear pattern or grouping
attribute_door_placement: multiple exterior doors located on the front and rear facades, accessible via ramps and stairs, with at least one door per main section
